blogs.title: How to Get a UK Student Visa in 2025 — Complete Guide
blogs.excerpt: Everything you need to know about the UK Student visa application process.
blogs.content:
## What is the UK Student Visa?

The UK Student visa (previously Tier 4) allows you to study at a licensed UK institution for courses longer than 6 months.

## Key Requirements

1. Confirmation of Acceptance for Studies (CAS)
2. English language proficiency — IELTS Academic 6.0+
3. Financial evidence for tuition and living costs
4. Genuine Student requirement

## How MVR Helps

Our visa specialists have achieved a 98% UK Student visa success rate. [Book a free consultation](/contact).

blogs.title: Top 10 Scholarships for Indian Students Studying Abroad in 2025
blogs.excerpt: A curated list of the best fully-funded scholarships for Indian students.
blogs.content:
## Why Scholarships Matter

Scholarships can significantly reduce the cost of studying abroad.

## Top Opportunities

1. Chevening Scholarship (UK) — full funding
2. Fulbright-Nehru Fellowship (USA) — full funding
3. DAAD Scholarship (Germany) — monthly stipend
4. Australia Awards — full tuition + living costs
5. Commonwealth Scholarship (UK) — Masters funding

[Contact our scholarship team](/contact) for personalised guidance.
